name: Oyster Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Render the Tasso, ham, and sausage in bacon fat until fully cooked.
2. Add diced onion, celery, and bell peppers to the pan. Sauté until translucent.
3. Stir in chili peppers, garlic, and thyme. Continue sautéing until the garlic turns golden.
4. Incorporate the rice, deglazing with oyster liquid, then add stock, salt, white pepper, and cayenne.
5. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and stir in green onions, parsley, and raw oysters.
6. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the rice is cooked through.
7. Adjust seasonings as needed (should be spicy). Makes about 6 1/2 cups.
